subcodes.first_line: O Khalil! Thy petition hath been presented before the Most Holy and Glorious Throne and hath been honored with the hearing of the Lord of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خلیل عریضه ات تلقاء عرش قدس جلیل حاضر و باصغای مالک اسماء مشرف
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @Manifestation of God as sun
